4. WAR OF PROPAGANDA - 05/05/2006 07:17:37 PM
I always loved Gobellus, the information and propaganda minister of third
Reich. Hitler’s right hand man. Germany won France in a surprising manner
using words. Gobellus took the predictions of Nostradamus, that France will
lose the war with Germany. He made leaflets and dropped all over the
France. This had disastrous effect on the psyche and morale of the people of

France. Later Germany waged war against France. The war was won by
Germany in less than 18 days.
